title: First Prize at Smart India Hackathon
description: Our students won the first prize in the national level hackathon for their innovative solution on urban traffic management using AI.

title: Best Paper Award at IEEE Conference
description: Awarded for outstanding research in the field of quantum computing and neural networks at the International IEEE Conference.

title: Winners of National Robotics Championship
description: Secured the championship trophy for building an autonomous rescue robot capable of navigating hazardous terrains.
